beats.speaker: Lyra
beats.text: Sera sent you, right? She said you might need a room.

beats.speaker: Lyra
beats.text: I have one upstairs. Two thousand gold a night.

beats.speaker: Lyra
beats.text: Clean sheets, a roof, and dinner close enough that you can smell it. Fair price.

beats.speaker: MC
beats.text: I do not have that kind of money.

beats.speaker: Lyra
beats.text: Yeah, I figured. You look like you came here with nothing but a headache.

beats.speaker: Lyra
beats.text: I lost my axe in the forest while I was gathering ingredients. Wolves scared me off before I could grab it.

beats.speaker: Lyra
beats.text: Good. The forest is close, but keep your head up.

options.text: Will I get to stay for free if I do this?

beats.speaker: Lyra
beats.text: If you bring it back, you can stay. Not forever without lifting a finger, but you will have a bed.

options.text: Sera said I should be resting...

beats.speaker: Lyra
beats.text: You should. But it is nearby, and I would go myself if those wolves were not still sniffing around.

beats.speaker: Lyra
beats.text: Take the forest path when you are ready. Bring my axe back, and we will figure out your room.
